productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Numbers Grey Flip Flops
description: The Numbers flip flop from adidas featuresnumbers on its footbed around the medial, resembling a clock. It is every mathlethe's fantasy. Pait it with your favourite tee and washed denims. Upper Rubber straps in a thong style, with fabric toe separator and adidas 3-Stripes on the axis of the flip flops PU footbed for cushioned comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with geametrical lugs for maximum traction Flip Flops care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
